title: Sorghum exothecum
taxonomy: Sorghum exothecum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It belongs to the genus Sorghum, which includes several species of grain crops. Sorghum exothecum is also known as the wild sorghum or broom sorghum. The plant is native to Africa and Asia, and its classification is further supported by its botanical characteristics and genetic analysis. As a member of the Poaceae family, Sorghum exothecum shares similarities with other grasses and cereals.
